review_comment: wanring message also use `RedactLogDisable`, is it the expected behavior? Because warning will not cause error, and the warning message will be recorded in the slow log if current sql is slow log.
Slow log have supported the ```tidb_redact_log```. it have been tracked in the https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/51306. We can consider it as the default behavior.
Maybe change it to private function since it is not suggested to use in product?
In fact, we use it in the UT for planner package.
It is to build the range info which is used in explain.
String comparison is slow. Why not use a custom type like `type RedactMode int8` instead?

The root cause is that this enum was originally defined as a string. This also involves the slow log and other sections controlled by tidb_redact_log. Therefore, if we need to make changes, it would be better to create a new PR to address the issue
